questions.question: Which statement about Java local variables is correct?

options.A: Local variables receive default values automatically.
options.B: A local variable must be initialized before first use.
options.D: Local variables can only be declared in methods.
options.E: Local variables are stored in heap.
options.F: Local variables are shared by all threads.

questions.explanation: Java requires local variables to be definitely assigned before they are read.

questions.question: Select all valid statements about String in Java.

options.F: String cannot be compared using equals().

questions.explanation: String implements CharSequence, is immutable, and literals can be interned in the string pool.

questions.question: Which keyword is used to prevent method overriding?
questions.explanation: A final method cannot be overridden in subclasses.

questions.question: Which interfaces are part of Java Collection Framework root contracts?
questions.explanation: List, Set, Queue extend Collection; Map is part of framework but separate from Collection hierarchy.

questions.question: What does stream.map() do?

options.A: Filters elements based on a predicate.
options.B: Transforms each element into another value.
options.C: Sorts elements in descending order by default.
options.D: Collects stream into a list automatically.

questions.explanation: map is an intermediate operation that transforms each element.
